- [ ] Frontend tests pass locally
- [ ] Lint/type checks pass locally

- [ ] No deployment impact

- [ ] feature
- [ ] fix
- [ ] security
- [ ] breaking-change
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue/task
- [ ] Added/updated tests where needed
- [ ] Updated docs/README where needed
- [ ] No secrets committed (.env, keys, tokens)
